query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "beyond scalar rewards by internalizing reasoning into score distributi" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly investigates the mechanism of internalizing reasoning into LLM score distributions (specifically addressing "Assessment Misalignment" where models assign incorrect scores to reasoning chains) and proposes a method to calibrate these scores, which is the core subject of the user's referenced work "Beyond Scalar Rewards by Internalizing Reasoning into Score Distribution."
